key.name: control-port
key.description: TCP port on 127.0.0.1 where tor's ControlPort listens.

key.name: cookie-path
key.description: Path to tor's control auth cookie (32 raw bytes). ~ expands to $HOME at runtime.

key.name: control-password
key.description: Cleartext password used if cookie auth is unavailable. Matches HashedControlPassword in torrc.

key.name: manage-system-proxy
key.description: When enabled, start an embedded PAC server and set org.gnome.system.proxy mode=auto with autoconfig-url pointing at it. Chrome and most modern browsers honor PAC URLs even when they ignore direct SOCKS gsettings, which is why this is the default. Reverted on toggle off.

key.name: pac-port
key.description: Port on 127.0.0.1 where the embedded proxy-autoconfig server listens.

key.name: saved-autoconfig-url
key.summary: Internal: saved autoconfig-url before enabling Tor

key.name: default-exit-country
key.description: Two-letter country code for ExitNodes. Empty means any country.

key.name: bridge-lines
key.description: One bridge line per entry, e.g. "obfs4 1.2.3.4:443 FINGERPRINT cert=... iat-mode=0".

key.name: saved-proxy-mode
key.summary: Internal: saved proxy mode before enabling Tor

key.name: saved-socks-host
key.summary: Internal: saved SOCKS host before enabling Tor

key.name: saved-socks-port
key.summary: Internal: saved SOCKS port before enabling Tor

key.name: saved-use-same-proxy
key.summary: Internal: saved use-same-proxy before enabling Tor

key.name: saved-use-same-proxy-set
key.summary: Internal: whether saved-use-same-proxy contains a captured value
